name: Seasonal Visibility
overview: Automatically hides and reveals movies & TV shows based on real-world seasons and holidays.
description: A Jellyfin plugin that automatically hides and reveals movies & TV shows based on real-world seasons and holidays. Tag your Christmas movies with christmas, Halloween films with halloween, and more.

versions.changelog: v2.0.0: Added interactive config UI with season rules editor. Auto-date calculation for Easter, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Valentine's Day, New Year, Summer, St. Patrick's Day, and Hanukkah. Rules auto-apply on save without needing to manually run the scheduled task. Default rules pre-populated on fresh install.
Added checksum verification and unblock on uninstall.
